name: Citrine - Keeping Busy
description:
(CW for dub-con, hypnosis, tonguefucking (I guess???),  paw kinks, and quite possibly more.)
"A taste of mansion life... but can you handle it?" (Perfect Home)

Surprised? I added Felicity in the original, but I couldn't add Locke because of the lack of CAI knowledge retention. but here? I can do everything I can remember! So, Locke and Felicity are here (with extra info from some one of Hypnocatto's other games.)

...Of course, this is my first J.AI bot... be patient with me.

Art is by [@DizzyMilky](https://www.furaffinity.net/view/43307209/), the *chief* Citrine fan~
creator: TheHypnosisFanatic
